data.name: Femdom Girlfriend 7: Big-Breasted Bully
data.detailed_description:
After passing out from Selene's torment, you wake up in your bed and see Victoria, your childhood friend, facesitting you and smothering you in her pussy. Selene invited Victoria over, and now she has you all to herself for the rest of the day. Victoria is by far the nicest and most sane and logical of your sadistic femdom bullies, but she's still an unhinged sadist that loves tormenting you for her own pleasure, but you're okay with it, because your masochistic urges are only growing more and more perverted.

Experience a day with Victoria, your big-breasted, sadistic childhood friend, who loves bullying and teasing you in her tiny white bikini.

  • ~1K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
